# Do11y

> Do11y is a documentation observability solution from Axiom. It turns documentation usage into machine data by streaming behavioral events — page views, scroll depth, link clicks, search queries, code-block copies, section reading time, tab switches, TOC clicks, feedback, and expand/collapse interactions — from your docs site to Axiom in real time.

Do11y is agent-native: it detects AI platform referrers (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, DeepSeek, and others) so you can understand how agents and humans engage with your content differently.

The runtime artifact is a single dependency-free JavaScript file. It supports Mintlify, Docusaurus, Nextra, MkDocs Material, and VitePress out of the box. For other frameworks, manual setup is available via CDN or self-hosting.

Privacy: no cookies, no PII, no device fingerprinting, no cross-site tracking. Uses sessionStorage. No GDPR consent banner required.

## Docs

- [Introduction](https://axiomhq.github.io/do11y/introduction): What Do11y tracks, the privacy model, and supported frameworks.
- [Prerequisites](https://axiomhq.github.io/do11y/prerequisites): Create an Axiom account, dataset, and ingest-only API token.
- [Manual setup](https://axiomhq.github.io/do11y/install/manual): CDN and self-hosting instructions for any framework, plus the automatic GitHub Action sync and integration dashboard.
- [Configuration](https://axiomhq.github.io/do11y/configuration): All configuration options — Axiom connection, behavioral options, framework values, and custom selectors.
- [APL queries](https://axiomhq.github.io/do11y/queries): Ready-to-run APL queries for traffic, engagement, navigation, content performance, and more.
- [Reference](https://axiomhq.github.io/do11y/reference): Events schema, AI traffic detection fields, JavaScript API, and known limitations.

## Optional

- [GitHub](https://github.com/axiomhq/do11y): Source code, releases, and issue tracker.
- [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@axiomhq/do11y): Package published as @axiomhq/do11y.
- [Axiom](https://axiom.co): The observability platform that powers Do11y.
